title: EV Analysis por Sessão (Cash e Torneio)
plan: Add get_session_allin_hands(session) and get_allin_hands_for_day(day) query methods to src/db/repository.py
Add get_session_ev_analysis(session) method to EVAnalyzer in src/analyzers/ev.py, reusing existing _compute_hand_ev logic with session-time filtering
Enhance TournamentAnalyzer._get_daily_ev_analysis(day) in src/analyzers/tournament.py to return mini chart data and luck badge info
Create _render_session_ev_card() in src/reports/cash_report.py with mini sparkline EV vs Real SVG, all-in count, EV net, real net, luck factor, and Lucky/Unlucky badge
Integrate session EV cards into cash daily report loop in cash_report.py, preserving global EV summary at top
Create _render_daily_ev_section() in src/reports/tournament_report.py with mini sparkline, stats, and luck badge per day
Integrate daily EV sections into tournament daily report rendering, preserving global EV summary
Test with edge cases: sessions with no all-ins, single all-in, multiple sessions per day, multi-tournament days
